summary: Phase 2 verification complete: Templates, Inbox, Analytics, Settings pages tested. All backend APIs (system info, templates CRUD, inbox/conversations, analytics endpoints) working correctly. Frontend flows functional with minor console warnings.

design_issues.issue: Console warnings: 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0'. Charts render correctly but show timing-related warnings.
React key warnings: 'Encountered two children with the same key'. Template dropdown items use template name as key instead of unique ID.
design_issues.suggested_fix: Use t.id instead of t.name as the key in SelectItem components

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/system/info (mock_mode=true, no secrets exposed)
Backend: POST /api/templates/sync (synced >= 3 templates)
Backend: GET /api/templates (list templates)
Backend: POST /api/templates (create template, auto-approved)
Backend: DELETE /api/templates/{id} (delete template)
Backend: Templates tenant isolation (404 for other tenant's WABA)
Backend: POST /api/inbox/simulate-inbound (create conversation)
Backend: GET /api/inbox/conversations (service_window_open=true)
Backend: GET /api/inbox/conversations/{id}/messages (thread with inbound message)
Backend: POST /api/inbox/conversations/{id}/reply (reply while window open)
Backend: GET /api/analytics/overview (all required fields present)
Backend: GET /api/analytics/timeseries (daily buckets with correct structure)
Backend: GET /api/analytics/by-template (template stats)
Backend: GET /api/analytics/by-phone (phone number stats)
Backend: Meta client import (no crash, server running)
Frontend: Templates page - Sync from Meta (>= 3 rows)
Frontend: Templates page - Create new template (qa_template_1)
Frontend: Inbox page - Conversation list visible
Frontend: Inbox page - Window badge shows 'Window open'
Frontend: Inbox page - Reply sent successfully
Frontend: Analytics page - Stat cards visible
Frontend: Analytics page - Timeseries chart (recharts SVG) rendered
Frontend: Analytics page - Date range switch (Last 7 days) successful
Frontend: Settings page - 'MOCK MODE' pill visible
Frontend: Settings page - 'Placeholder' pill for META_APP_ID
Frontend: Settings page - Worker shows 'Running'
Frontend: Send page - Template selector populated
Frontend: Send page - 'hello_world' template found in dropdown

optional_improvements: Fix React key warnings in SendPage template dropdown by using t.id as key instead of t.name
Investigate recharts width/height warnings on AnalyticsPage (likely a ResponsiveContainer timing issue)
action_item_for_main_agent.notes: Both issues are LOW priority and do NOT block functionality. All Phase 2 features are working correctly. No critical bugs found.
